description: Small fragment from a legal deed written by Halfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (active 1100–38 CE) involving a freedwoman (המשוחררת) named Ikhtiṣār, who is mentioned in Appendix 1 of Craig Perry, Slavery and the Jews of Medieval Egypt. Perry notes that this may be the same person referenced in: T-S NS 184.31 (PGPID 23819).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
